# Port target: `@typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin`

| | |
|---|---|
| Upstream repo | https://github.com/typescript-eslint/typescript-eslint |
| Submodule | `upstream/typescript-eslint` @ `v8.62.0` (`packages/eslint-plugin`) |
| Baseline npm version | `8.62.0` |
| License | MIT |
| Oxlint native support | partial — 127 rule(s) covered by Oxlint natively and excluded from this inventory |
| Rules to port | 7 |

> Oxlint's native `typescript` plugin covers 127 of these rules; only the 7 rules Oxlint does not implement natively are tracked here as port targets. The covered rules are listed in `oxlintCovered` and excluded from the inventory.

## Rules

| # | Rule | Description | Docs |
|---|------|-------------|------|
| 1 | `member-ordering` | Require a consistent member declaration order | [docs](https://typescript-eslint.io/rules/member-ordering) |
| 2 | `method-signature-style` | Enforce using a particular method signature syntax | [docs](https://typescript-eslint.io/rules/method-signature-style) |
| 3 | `naming-convention` | Enforce naming conventions for everything across a codebase | [docs](https://typescript-eslint.io/rules/naming-convention) |
| 4 | `no-invalid-this` | Disallow `this` keywords outside of classes or class-like objects | [docs](https://typescript-eslint.io/rules/no-invalid-this) |
| 5 | `no-type-alias` | Disallow type aliases | [docs](https://typescript-eslint.io/rules/no-type-alias) |
| 6 | `sort-type-constituents` | Enforce constituents of a type union/intersection to be sorted alphabetically | [docs](https://typescript-eslint.io/rules/sort-type-constituents) |
| 7 | `typedef` | Require type annotations in certain places | [docs](https://typescript-eslint.io/rules/typedef) |
